meta.name: Send a personalized WhatsApp morning brief with GPT-4o, Google and WATI

parameters.content:
☀️ WhatsApp Daily Briefing Bot
Workflow Purpose
Delivers a personalized morning summary via WATI combining live weather, news, Google Calendar events, and Google Tasks, featuring a motivational OpenAI greeting.

🚀 How it Works
Dual Triggers: Fires automatically at 7 AM or manually when a user texts a command.

Data Retrieval: Sequentially fetches weather data, top headlines, and your daily agenda from Google services.

AI Personalization: OpenAI crafts a short, context-aware opener based on your specific daily schedule and local weather.

Assembly & Dispatch: Merges all data into a formatted WhatsApp card for delivery.

nodes.name: ① ENTRY POINTS  ·  Schedule Trigger  ·  Wati Trigger  ·  Intent Router

parameters.content:
### Two ways the briefing fires

**A) Automated — Schedule Trigger (7AM Daily)**
Cron: `0 7 * * *`
Fires every morning → straight to `Load User Config` → full briefing pipeline runs for every subscriber.

**B) On-Demand — Wati Trigger → Intent Router**
User sends a WhatsApp message → Switch node routes:

**Both A and B converge at `Load User Config`.**
Schedule path passes subscriber list items; on-demand path passes the sender's phone + default preferences.

nodes.name: ③ FETCH WEATHER  ·  FETCH NEWS  ·  Two HTTP GET nodes

parameters.content:
### Weather & News — two live data fetches
**Node 1 · Fetch Weather** (HTTP GET)
URL: `https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=YOUR_CITY&appid=YOUR_KEY&units=metric`
Returns: `main.temp`, `main.feels_like`, `main.humidity`, `wind.speed`, `weather[0].description`, `name`
**Node 2 · Fetch News** (HTTP GET)
URL: `https://newsapi.org/v2/top-headlines?q=YOUR_TOPICS&apiKey=YOUR_KEY&pageSize=3`
Returns: `articles[]` with `title`, `source.name`, `url`

nodes.name: ④ GET CALENDAR EVENTS  ·  GET DUE TASKS  ·  Google Calendar + Google Tasks

parameters.content:
### Calendar & Tasks — two Google OAuth2 nodes
**Node 1 · Get Today's Calendar Events** (Google Calendar).Operation: `getAll`.Calendar: `primary`
Returns: array of events with `summary`, `start.dateTime`, `start.date`, `location`
**Node 2 · Get Due Tasks** (Google Tasks).Resource: `task` · Operation: `getAll`.Tasklist: `primary`
Returns: array of tasks with `title`, `due`, `notes`, `status`

nodes.name: ⑤ OPENAI – GENERATE DAILY OPENER  ·  HTTP POST

parameters.content:
Nodes: OpenAI – Opener → Assemble Briefing → WATI – Send
AI Opener: OpenAI (gpt-4o) crafts a unique, 15-word motivational greeting using the subscriber's name, weather, and daily event/task count.
Aggregation: Assemble Briefing merges weather, news, calendar, and task data into a formatted WhatsApp card, with a fallback greeting for reliability.
Delivery: Delivers the complete morning briefing via WATI.

nodes.name: ⑦ SUBSCRIBE / STOP / HELP  ·  Code + WATI send nodes

parameters.content:
**Subscribe path** (keyword: `subscribe`).`Add Subscriber` code node logs the sender's phone + name..In this template the list lives in `Load User Config` — edit that node to add them permanently.
`WATI – Confirm Subscribe` sends: *"You're subscribed! Daily briefing at 7AM."*

**Stop path** (keyword: `stop`)
`Remove Subscriber` code node prepares opt-out confirmation..Edit `Load User Config` to remove their entry from the subscribers array.
`WATI – Confirm Unsubscribe` sends: *"You've been unsubscribed. Send subscribe to rejoin."*
